EN-ES Printable Resource

Shapes Around Us: A K-2 Vocabulary Pack (English-Spanish)

This vocabulary pack introduces basic shapes to K-2 ELL newcomer students, featuring dual-language support, engaging worksheets, and a simple mini-book for hands-on learning.

TopicShapes
Age BandK-2
Pack Typevocabulary pack
LanguageEN-ES

✨ What's Inside

  • 10 vocabulary items
  • 3 worksheets
  • Mini-book (8 pages)
  • Teacher notes & answer key

📖 How to Use

Introduce shapes using visual aids and real-world examples. Use the mini-book for shared reading and independent practice. Worksheets can be used for reinforcement, assessment, or homework. Encourage students to point out shapes they see in the classroom.

Worksheet 1

matching
Name: ____________________

Draw a line from the English word to its Spanish translation and then to the correct shape picture.

Dibuja una línea de la palabra en inglés a su traducción en español y luego a la imagen de la forma correcta.

LanternELLTeacher Notes📄 Printable Pack

Teacher Notes

🎯 Objective

Students will be able to identify and name basic shapes (circle, square, triangle, rectangle, star, heart, oval, diamond, hexagon, semicircle) in both English and Spanish.

💡 Suggested Use

Introduce shapes using visual aids and real-world examples. Use the mini-book for shared reading and independent practice. Worksheets can be used for reinforcement, assessment, or homework. Encourage students to point out shapes they see in the classroom.

📦 Materials Needed

  • Crayons or colored pencils
  • Pencils
  • Scissors (for mini-book assembly)
  • Glue sticks (for mini-book assembly)
  • Optional: Real-world objects representing shapes (e.g., a ball, a book, a cracker)

🔀 Differentiation Tips

  • **For students needing more support:** Pre-teach vocabulary with flashcards. Provide physical shape manipulatives. Pair with a peer for collaborative activities.
  • **For students ready for a challenge:** Ask them to draw objects that are specific shapes. Introduce 3D shapes. Have them create a 'shape hunt' in the classroom or at home.

LanternELLAnswer Key 1📄 Printable Pack

Answer Key

ws-1

1.Circle / Círculo (matches to circle image)
2.Square / Cuadrado (matches to square image)
3.Triangle / Triángulo (matches to triangle image)
4.Rectangle / Rectángulo (matches to rectangle image)
5.Star / Estrella (matches to star image)

ws-2

Completion of tracing words and drawing shapes.
